finding: The deployment workflow's contract-test block did not execute materialize-missing-deployment-evidence.test.mjs even though blocked-path materialization is required by atomic evidence finalization.
improvement: Added a dedicated source-change workflow that runs blocked-path materialization and atomic finalization tests and asserts the finalizer and deployment workflow remain wired.

verification.strongest_supported_claim: The workflow definition is committed on the default branch; no GitHub Actions execution was available when inspected.

privacy_boundary: Contains repository paths, commit identity, and test-contract state only; no secrets, private chat, health material, or user-identifying content.
limits: Does not establish valid Cloudflare credentials.
Does not prove a resolving Cloudflare Pages hostname.
Does not prove the tests pass in GitHub Actions until a run is observed.
Does not establish scientific or medical truth.
falsification_route: A future source change to blocked-path materialization or finalization that does not trigger this workflow, a failing workflow run, or removal of either wiring assertion falsifies the claimed gate coverage.
